last_substantive_baseline.title: Use Blob endpoint for browser report CORS
last_substantive_baseline.claim_boundary: This baseline proves the Blob-endpoint repository architecture and a successful read-only four-create Azure plan. It does not prove current pricing, effective role-assignment write permission, deployment, managed-identity publication, browser rendering, or a committed live frontend source.

repository_observation.head_semantics: PR #42 merge commit observed before resetting and repairing PR #41 onto current main
repository_observation.claim_boundary: This is a time-bounded observation. Resolve the live main head, PR state, reviews, CI, and Azure reality whenever this file is read.

authored_change.write_owner: ChatGPT conversation: Azure IaC MSP Lab — bounded PR #41 repair explicitly authorized by Anthony Edgar with 'Proceed'
authored_change.scope: Rebase the publication execution proposal onto PR #42's merged Blob-endpoint architecture, pin successful read-only planner run 29974111656 and its artifact digest, enforce the exact four-create Storage/Blob/$web/RBAC allowlist, verify Blob-only anonymous reads and managed-identity writes, preserve rollback and protected-resource boundaries, and reconcile project state. This repository-only repair does not authenticate to Azure, grant permissions, dispatch the workflow, deploy resources, run guest commands, publish a report, or change the frontend source.
verification_criteria: PR #41 is based on current main commit d181c48bf718c65015f83e04e1bbf9a7bcf152f4 with no merge conflict
workflow defaults pin planner run 29974111656, commit d181c48bf718c65015f83e04e1bbf9a7bcf152f4, and artifact digest faed857cbd230e55b206ca6ab05adeeca75c98a9a48b0dc43bb04293cde09333
planner verification accepts exactly one Storage account, Blob service, $web Blob-only container, and Storage-scoped collector role assignment
Provider execution What-If rejects Modify, Delete, Replace, extra Create, and protected infrastructure changes

postdeployment verification requires Blob endpoint output, account anonymous Blob allowance, disabled shared-key writes, exact CORS, versioning, retention, $web publicAccess Blob, and exact current-principal role scope
publisher preflight occurs before deployment and managed-identity publication occurs only after the bounded resources exist
automatic rollback is armed before the single deployment and can remove only the matching role and dedicated report Storage account
project validation, all infrastructure tests, ServiceTracer tests, and Bicep lint/build pass on the exact PR head
the final PR diff remains limited to the seven declared paths
authored_change.failure_behavior: Keep PR #41 draft, inspect the exact failing test or review finding, patch only declared paths, and obtain fresh exact-head CI. Do not dispatch the workflow, grant Azure permissions, weaken the four-create allowlist, broaden anonymous access to Container, enable shared-key writes, introduce wildcard CORS, or touch collector/network resources.
authored_change.rollback: Close PR #41 without merge or reset its branch to main. No Azure rollback applies because this repair performs no Azure authentication or mutation.

bounded_authority_grants.authorization_source: Explicit user instruction after the read-only Azure planning boundary was stated
bounded_authority_grants.claim_boundary: This grant authorizes Azure reads and ProviderNoRbac planning only. It does not authorize deployment, RBAC changes, report publication, endpoint configuration, guest commands, or any Azure mutation.

completed_increments.title: Decouple live report publication from collector compute
Repair read-only planner RBAC evidence capture
Use ProviderNoRbac for read-only ARM planning
Use Blob endpoint for browser report CORS

proven: exact reviewed commit checkout and bounded authority validation succeeded
Azure OIDC login and current resource-group and collector inventory succeeded
no tagged report Storage account or visible collector publication role existed
What-If contained 21 Ignore and exactly four Create changes
the creates were one Storage account, one Blob service, one $web Blob-only container, and one Storage-scoped collector role assignment
zero Modify, Delete, and Replace changes were present
no Azure mutation was authorized or performed
unproven: current Storage pricing, quota, and policy allowance
collector publisher availability at execution time
browser rendering and committed live frontend source

latest_promoted_evidence.freshness_boundary: This is current planning evidence for main commit d181c48bf718c65015f83e04e1bbf9a7bcf152f4. Re-resolve Azure state, cost, quota, permissions, collector identity, publisher availability, and exact Provider What-If immediately before any separately authorized deployment.

pr42_blob_endpoint_repair.claim_boundary: Architecture and read-only plan only; not Azure execution or browser proof.

pr41_publication_execution_promotion.claim_boundary: Repository-only executable workflow proposal. Merge and Azure dispatch remain separately unauthorized.

authority_defaults.rule: Defaults remain fail-closed. The active read-only planning grant is the only Azure authentication exception; draft PR #41 creates no deployment authority.

live_state_resolution.repository_head: Query the live GitHub default branch at read time.
live_state_resolution.pull_requests: Query live PR head, draft state, mergeability, reviews, threads, and exact-head CI.
live_state_resolution.ci: Query workflow runs and jobs for the exact commit under evaluation.
live_state_resolution.azure: Use fresh authenticated Azure evidence; repository declarations and historical artifacts are insufficient.
